translations.en: Mom said she would give a gift.
translations.es: Mamá dijo que daría un regalo.
translations.fr: Maman a dit qu'elle offrirait un cadeau.
translations.de: Mama sagte, sie würde ein Geschenk geben.
translations.it: Mamma ha detto che avrebbe fatto un regalo.
translations.pt: Mamãe disse que daria um presente.
translations.vi: Mẹ nói sẽ tặng một món quà.
translations.nl: Mama zei dat ze een cadeau zou geven.
translations.hu: Anya azt mondta, hogy ajándékot fog adni.
translations.hi: माँ ने कहा कि वह एक उपहार देगी।
translations.el: Η μαμά είπε ότι θα χαρίσει ένα δώρο.
translations.nb: Mamma sa at hun ville gi en gave.
translations.id: Ibu bilang dia akan memberikan hadiah.
translations.sv: Mamma sa att hon skulle ge en present.
translations.ro: Mama a spus că va oferi un cadou.
translations.da: Mor sagde, at hun ville give en gave.
translations.ja: お母さんがプレゼントをくれると言った。

tokens.explanation: '엄마' is a common noun meaning 'mother'; '-가' is the nominative case marker indicating the subject.
'선물하다' is a verb meaning 'to gift'; '-다고' is the quotative clause ending used for indirect speech or reported content.
'말하다' is a verb meaning 'to say'; '-했어요' is the past tense polite ending.

translations.ja: 私は単語 선물하다 を学びます。

tokens.explanation: '선물하다' is a verb meaning 'to gift'; '-다는' is the nominalizing/attributive clause marker used to quote or define the preceding verb as a noun phrase.
'단어' is a noun meaning 'word'; '-를' is the accusative case marker indicating the direct object.
'배우다' is a verb meaning 'to learn'; '-요' is the present tense polite ending ('배워요').

translations.en: My friend says they'll give gifts at Christmas.
translations.es: Mi amigo dice que dará regalos en Navidad.
translations.fr: Mon ami dit qu'il offrira des cadeaux à Noël.
translations.de: Mein Freund sagt, dass er zu Weihnachten Geschenke geben wird.
translations.it: Il mio amico dice che farà dei regali a Natale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的朋友说他会在圣诞节送礼物。
translations.yue: 我朋友話佢聖誕節會送禮物。
translations.ru: Мой друг говорит, что подарит подарки на Рождество.
translations.pt: Meu amigo diz que dará presentes no Natal.
translations.he: החבר שלי אומר שהוא יתן מתנות בחג המולד.
translations.vi: Bạn tôi nói họ sẽ tặng quà vào Giáng Sinh.
translations.ar: صديقي يقول إنه سيعطي هدايا في عيد الميلاد.
translations.nl: Mijn vriend zegt dat hij cadeaus zal geven met Kerstmis.
translations.uk: Мій друг каже, що подарує подарунки на Різдво.
translations.hu: A barátom azt mondja, hogy karácsonykor ajándékokat ad.
translations.hi: मेरा दोस्त कहता है कि वह क्रिसमस पर उपहार देगा।
translations.pl: Mój przyjaciel mówi, że da prezenty na Boże Narodzenie.
translations.el: Ο φίλος μου λέει ότι θα δώσει δώρα τα Χριστούγεννα.
translations.nb: Vennen min sier at han vil gi gaver til jul.
translations.id: Teman saya bilang dia akan memberi hadiah saat Natal.
translations.sv: Min vän säger att han kommer att ge presenter till jul.
translations.ro: Prietenul meu spune că va dărui cadouri de Crăciun.
translations.cs: Můj přítel říká, že na Vánoce rozdá dárky.
translations.da: Min ven siger, at han vil give gaver til jul.
translations.fi: Ystäväni sanoo, että hän antaa lahjoja jouluna.
translations.ja: 友達がクリスマスにプレゼントをくれると言っています。

tokens.explanation: '친구' is a noun meaning 'friend'; '-가' is the nominative case marker indicating the subject.
'크리스마스' is a proper noun meaning 'Christmas'; '-에' is the locative/time particle meaning 'at' or 'on'.
'선물하다' is a verb meaning 'to gift'; '-다고' is the quotative clause ending used for indirect speech or reported content.
'하다' is a verb meaning 'to do'; here '해요' functions as 'says' in reported speech with the polite ending.

translations.en: Oh, I forgot that I had to give a gift.
translations.es: Oh, se me olvidó que tenía que dar un regalo.
translations.fr: Oh, j'ai oublié que je devais offrir un cadeau.
translations.de: Oh, ich habe vergessen, dass ich ein Geschenk geben sollte.
translations.it: Oh, ho dimenticato che dovevo fare un regalo.
translations.ru: Ой, я забыл, что должен был подарить подарок.
translations.pt: Oh, esqueci que tinha que dar um presente.
translations.vi: Ơ, tôi quên mất rằng mình phải tặng quà.
translations.ar: أوه، نسيت أن عليّ أن أُقدم هدية.
translations.nl: Oh, ik ben vergeten dat ik een cadeau moest geven.
translations.uk: Ой, я забув, що мав подарувати подарунок.
translations.hu: Jaj, elfelejtettem, hogy ajándékot kellett adnom.
translations.hi: ओह, मैं भूल गया कि मुझे उपहार देना था।
translations.pl: Och, zapomniałem, że musiałem dać prezent.
translations.el: Ωχ, ξέχασα ότι έπρεπε να κάνω ένα δώρο.
translations.nb: Åh, jeg glemte at jeg måtte gi en gave.
translations.id: Oh, saya lupa bahwa saya harus memberi hadiah.
translations.sv: Åh, jag glömde att jag var tvungen att ge en present.
translations.ro: Oh, am uitat că trebuia să dau un cadou.
translations.cs: Ach, zapomněl jsem, že jsem měl dát dárek.
translations.da: Åh, jeg glemte, at jeg skulle give en gave.
translations.fi: Oi, unohdin, että minun piti antaa lahja.
translations.ja: あっ、プレゼントを渡さなければならなかったのを忘れていた。

tokens.explanation: Interjection expressing surprise or sudden realization (akin to 'oh!' or 'ah!').
'선물하다' is a verb meaning 'to gift'; '-다고' is the quotative clause ending used for indirect speech or reported content.
'깜빡하다' is a verb meaning 'to forget' or 'to slip one's mind'; '-했어요' is the past tense polite ending.

en: Mom said she would give a gift.
My friend says they'll give gifts at Christmas.
Oh, I forgot that I had to give a gift.
